description: Create a multi-file Talon noise action configuration package in C:\Users\Docker\.talon\user\noise_config\. In noise_actions.py, use the Talon API (Module, noise, ctrl, actions, ui) to define a user.noise_scroll_speed setting (int, default 5) and register handlers for "pop" and "hiss". The on_pop handler must insert "[REVIEWED]" when the active application is "notepad" and perform a left mouse click otherwise. The on_hiss handler must trigger "ctrl-a" in "notepad" and perform a vertical mouse scroll using the user.noise_scroll_speed setting otherwise. In noise_settings.talon, include the header comment # Noise action configuration settings and a settings block that sets user.noise_scroll_speed to 3. In README.md, include the title # Noise Action Configuration and a description of the default behaviors and Notepad-specific overrides.
